/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/src/monitor/cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/src/monitor/memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/src/monitor/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/src/ui/dashboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/external/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/external/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/external/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/external/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/external/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/external/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/external/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/external/implot/implot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/external/implot/implot_items.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemMonitor.dir/external/implot/implot_demo.cpp.o -o SystemMonitor  external/glfw/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo -framework CoreFoundation -framework QuartzCore
